texto: I looked at all the caged animals. . . . . . . the cast-offs of human society. I saw in their eyes love and hope, fear and dread, sadness and betrayal. And I was angry."God," I said, "this is terrible! Why don't you do something?"God was silent for a moment and then He spoke softly."I have done something. . .I created you.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Jim Willis que provoca limites e escolhas conscientes. Ao questionar “I looked at all the caged animals. . . . . . . the cast-offs of human society. I saw in their eye…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre fe, animals, god, com foco em god e help.

frase_original: I looked at all the caged animals. . . . . . . the cast-offs of human society. I saw in their eyes love and hope, fear and dread, sadness and betrayal. And I was angry."God," I said, "this is terrible! Why don't you do something?"God was silent for a moment and then He spoke softly."I have done something. . .I created you.
